reviews.comment:
Baños limpio con un buen aroma, la atención muy buena. Agua para el mate gratis, en la mayoría tuve pagar. Gracias Martín por dejarnos estacionar la moto a nuestra vista,así podíamos comer tranquilos!

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were clean and smelled nice, and the service was excellent. Water for mate was free; I had to pay at most places. Thanks, Martín, for letting us park our motorcycle in plain sight so we could eat in peace!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNkozLVBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.. estábamos de vacaciones y tenia una reunión por zoom el dueño super amable nos ayudo a instalarnos.. nos quedamos por tres horas usando las instalaciones..  internet de diez.. baños super limpios.. nos hicieron sentir re comodoS.. excelente!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service... we were on vacation and had a zoom meeting. The owner was super friendly and helped us get settled in. We stayed for three hours using the facilities. The internet was great. The bathrooms were super clean. They made us feel really comfortable. Excellent!!!

100% Recommended

reviews.comment:
Nefasta la atención, las empleadas unas desubicadas total, falta de respeto a los clientes con total impunidad sin posiblidad de presentar algún tipo de queja por ausencia del encargado, nefasto todo

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, totally out of place employees, lack of respect for customers with total impunity without the possibility of filing any kind of complaint due to the absence of the manager, terrible everything.
